title: Fix Type Change of nodep->bitp() in Constraints with String-Indexed Assoc-Arr

features.name: string_indexed_associative_array_in_class
features.description: Code should include a string-indexed associative array declared as a rand variable within a class
features.snippet: class AssocArrayIntegral; rand int str_index [string]; endclass

features.name: foreach_constraint_on_string_indexed_associative_array
features.description: Code should include a constraint with a foreach loop iterating over a string-indexed associative array

features.name: direct_string_key_access_in_constraint
features.description: Code should include a constraint with direct string key access to a string-indexed associative array
